iframes.title: 3rd party ad content
iframes.sandbox: allow-forms allow-popups allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation

iframes.style: position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; visibility: hidden;

iframes.name: google_ads_top_frame
iframes.style: display: none; position: fixed; left: -999px; top: -999px; width: 0px; height: 0px;

iframes.title: _hjSafeContext
iframes.style: display: none !important; width: 1px !important; height: 1px !important; opacity: 0 !important; pointer-events: none !important;
